markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy shifts and address website issues.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The content strategy is shifting from a traffic-first approach to a conversion-focused one, prioritizing bottom-funnel actions to support Siit's Q1 app access campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Immediate Website Issues:** The new website launch caused critical trial signup form failures and 404 errors on top-performing blog pages, requiring urgent investigation and fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Two-Part Execution Plan:** The plan involves refreshing top-performing blogs with new conversion elements (TLDRs, FAQs) and building dedicated comparison landing pages to capture high-intent traffic from tool reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**New Team Member:** Emmanuel Schwab (Manu) has joined Siit's marketing team and will now participate in these syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Topics

### Website Launch Issues

  - [The new website launch introduced critical issues impacting user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Trial Signup Form:** The form is broken, which directly blocks new user acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**404 Errors:** Top-performing blog pages are returning 404s, causing significant traffic loss and SEO damage.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Example:** The "workforce optimization software" article, a key traffic driver, is inaccessible.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:** Matt will compile a list of all broken pages and can connect Siit with GrowthX's tech SEO team for support.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Content Strategy Shift: Traffic → Conversion

  - [**Problem:** The current content strategy drives high traffic but has a low conversion rate, as the funnel from content to conversion is too steep.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift focus to bottom-funnel content to better capture high-intent users and support the Q1 app access campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
    1.  [**Refresh Top-Performing Blogs:** Optimize existing content for conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
    2.  [**Build Comparison Landing Pages:** Create dedicated pages to capture traffic from tool reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### Workstream 1: Blog Refresh for Conversion

  - [**Goal:** Reposition top-performing blogs to be more actionable and bottom-funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**New Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [**TLDR Sections:** Add a summary at the top of each article to immediately answer search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Proven to increase visibility in LLM search results (e.g., Homebase case study).](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**FAQ Sections:** Add to all older articles to improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [**Customer Quotes:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Goal:** Integrate relevant customer quotes into articles.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Process:** Carmel will provide quotes for specific articles (e.g., a Microsoft Teams quote for the "Microsoft Teams ticketing" article).](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [**Automation:** GrowthX can build a pipeline to automate quote insertion from a database if the volume becomes too high for manual selection.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Workstream 2: Comparison Landing Pages

  - [**Goal:** Create a dedicated conversion step for high-intent traffic from tool review pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Tool review pages drive significant traffic (\~1,750 sessions/week), but the current CTA (a generic free trial) is ineffective for users actively comparing software.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Build dedicated landing pages comparing Siit to top competitors (e.g., Jira, ServiceNow).](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Placement:** Link to these pages from relevant tool reviews via banners or dedicated sections.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Design:** The layout will be standard and functional, not overly aesthetic, to resonate with Siit's IT audience.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Compile a list of all broken blog pages (404s) and send to Carmel.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Suggest top ITSM competitors for the initial comparison landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Provide the relevant customer quote for the "Microsoft Teams ticketing" article refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Manu:**](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [Schedule a 1:1 onboarding call with Matt next week to review the partnership history and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/2VxsxXj_3QnX599BY7GrAeDrjAXzgq9a?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
